column1: Includes Amazon Marketplace, Fulfillment by Amazon (FBA), and Amazon Webstore transactions

date/time: posted date/time of the transaction

Other transaction fees: Includes shipping chargebacks, shipping holdbacks, per-item fees  and sales tax collection fees.
Other: Includes non-order transaction amounts. For more details, see the "Type" and "Description" columns for each order ID.

Note: Reports with start date of Jan 1, 2025 or later are indexed by posted date, include both released and deferred transactions and have two new columns. You may need to update integrations or third-party mappings.
